prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/328-deck.key in Keynote. Click the title placeholder on the first slide and type the title 'KinBench Keynote 328'. Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'keynote add_title ~/Desktop/kinbench/328-deck.key 1 "KinBench Keynote 328"'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/328-title-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
